name: Brankas
description: Open finance APIs and banking-as-a-service across APAC and MENA — payments, disbursements, and data APIs.

seo.title: Brankas — Payments Orchestration
seo.meta_description: Brankas: Open finance APIs and banking-as-a-service across APAC and MENA — payments, disbursements, and data APIs.

when_to_use: Bank account data APIs and disbursement for APAC fintech apps
Embedding open-banking payments into lending and BNPL apps in SEA
Real-time account verification and bank transfer initiation in MENA
BaaS APIs for neobank and wallet products launching in APAC

pros: Strong open-banking coverage across APAC and MENA
Bank transfers, disbursements, and data in one API
Good fit for emerging-market payout flows
cons: Not a card-first orchestrator; rails differ by country
Uptime varies with underlying bank APIs
Onboarding can take weeks per market
review.verdict: Go-to for bank-rail payments in APAC and MENA, but not a substitute for a card-focused orchestration layer.
review.best_for: Fintechs and marketplaces needing bank transfers, disbursements, and account data across emerging APAC or MENA.
review.not_for: Global card-first merchants who already have acquirer coverage in developed markets.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
